__comment__: Index-freshness probe thresholds for NFR-6 / INV-8.
Source: flow/requirements/README.md — NFR-6: search index refreshes
within 2s of a write; INV-8: any canonical artifact OR dashboard entity
is indexed for full-text search within its project scope within 2s of write.
The freshnessMs value below is the SINGLE source of truth: the probe
script (tests/probes/index-freshness.probe.js) reads this file and uses
it as the polling deadline, so the unit test and the live CI run can
never drift. Override the target host/project/write-target via env
